name: @ghost/extension-sdk
description: SDK for building Ghost CLI extensions with typed JSON-RPC helpers

scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json'));if(!pkg.version||pkg.version==='0.0.0')throw new Error('Version must be set before publishing');const idx=fs.readFileSync('index.js','utf8');const dts=fs.readFileSync('index.d.ts','utf8');if(!idx||!dts)throw new Error('Missing required files');console.log('✓ Package validation passed')"

author: Adel Lamallam
